quotes: This guide governs **patient (DTC) materials**. Language rules differ by audience: "someone/people with dermatomyositis" for patient materials; "patients" acceptable in HCP materials. Confirm audience in every brief before writing.

rules.intent: Ensure person-first, audience-appropriate language and prevent accidental cross-use of patient vs HCP terminology.
rules.rule_text: This guide governs patient (DTC) materials. Patient-facing copy must use person-first phrasing such as 'someone/people with dermatomyositis', while HCP materials may use the clinical term 'patients'. The intended audience (patient vs HCP) must be confirmed in every creative brief before writing begins.

quotes: Patient brochure = master reference for visuals, messaging, and tone across **all** LISRAYA materials.

rules.intent: Establish a single source-of-truth for brand consistency across all deliverables.
rules.rule_text: The patient brochure serves as the master reference for visuals, messaging, and tone across all LISRAYA materials; any new asset or campaign should be checked against it for consistency.
